body: ## [2.10.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.10.0...v2.10.1) (2018-08-17) ### Bug Fixes * **connectBreadcrumb:** ensure that data is an array ([#3067](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3067)) ([759f709](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/759f709))
